title: Black Netherite (Darker)
description: Just makes Netherite darker like a black color
body: This resource pack transforms all netherite items into a sleek, darker variant with a deep black finish. From armor to tools, each item has been retextured to deliver a more intense, shadowy aesthetic while preserving the original shape and layout. Ideal for players who prefer a minimalist or ominous look, this pack enhances the visual impact of netherite gear without altering gameplay mechanics. Compatible with Minecraft Java Edition 1.21.8 and designed for pixel-perfect alignment on player models.
